title: feature
description: Design → Implement → Review → Merge workflow for a new feature

title: Design health-analytics-dashboard
description: Create design document with architecture, data flow, and API contracts

title: Epic 1: Project Foundation & Infrastructure
description: Docker Compose setup, Nginx reverse proxy, dev environment, CI/CD pipeline, monorepo structure with apps/frontend + apps/backend

title: Epic 2: Core Health Data Engine
description: FastAPI backend, FHIR data models, SQLite/Postgres storage, REST API for vitals tracking, data validation

title: Epic 3: Knowledge Base & Medical Intelligence
description: Markdown-based medical knowledge base, drug interaction checking, condition lookups, guideline references

title: Epic 4: Frontend Foundation
description: Next.js 14 App Router, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui components, responsive layouts, offline-first PWA

title: Epic 5: Dashboard & Visualization
description: Health metrics visualization, charts (Recharts/D3), vitals dashboard, medication tracker, trend analysis

title: Epic 6: Data Import & Export
description: CSV/JSON/FHIR import, Apple Health/Google Fit integration, manual entry forms, data export

title: Epic 7: Security & Privacy
description: Local-only data, AES-256 encryption at rest, no cloud dependencies, audit logging, GDPR-by-design

title: Epic 8: Testing & QA
description: Pytest/Vitest test suites, E2E with Playwright, integration tests, CI/CD pipeline tests

title: Epic 9: Documentation & Deployment
description: README, API docs (OpenAPI), user guide, Docker deployment guide, ADR records
